title: teucrium luteum subsp. turdetanum
intro: Teucrium luteum subsp. turdetanum, also known as the Spanish germander, is a plant species belonging to the genus Teucrium and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Teucrium luteum subsp. turdetanum are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Teucrium luteum subsp. turdetanum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in the production of essential oils and herbal supplements.
